message: function `open_writer` returns `Shared[Conn]` while declaring effect(s) [db.write] that own a unique resource
expected: return an owned value (e.g. T or Result[T, E])

fixes.description: Return the owned value directly instead of `Shared[T]`.

patch.intent: Replace `Shared[T]` return with the unique resource in `sym:diag.borrow_shared_over_unique.open_writer`.

agent.summary: Do not share aliases to unique resources; return owned handles or scoped guards.
